description: Eval cases for supply chain security: dependencies, version pinning, XXE, manifest validation

cases.name: Unpinned dependency versions
cases.description: Dependencies without fixed versions vulnerable to compromised updates

cases.name: XXE vulnerability in XML parsing
cases.description: XML parser without XXE protection enabled
cases.code_snippet:
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

def parse_xml_config(xml_string):
    parser = ET.XMLParser()
    root = ET.fromstring(xml_string, parser=parser)
    return root

config = parse_xml_config(user_provided_xml)

cases.name: Known vulnerable transitive dependency
Installation of unsigned packages
cases.description: No verification of package signatures or checksums
cases.code_snippet:
#!/bin/bash
echo "Installing dependencies..."
npm install
python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
echo "Dependencies installed"

cases.name: Susceptibility to typosquatting
cases.description: Installation process doesn't validate package sources

cases.name: Properly pinned and verified dependencies
cases.description: Dependencies with exact versions and lock file
